sekhmet.name: Sekhmet
sekhmet.subtitle: Leonin Barbarian · Outlander
sekhmet.quote: The world has hardened. The mythic has compressed into stone. I am what did not forget to remain.
sekhmet.footer: ☀   The world hardened. He did not.   ☀

weapons.name: Sun-Disc Club
weapons.flavor: The Fist of the First Land

features.name: Rage
features.desc: Bonus action. +2 damage on STR attacks. Resistance to B/P/S damage. Advantage on STR checks and saves. Lasts 1 minute. 2 uses / long rest.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.desc: AC = 10 + DEX mod (+2) + CON mod (+2) = 14 while not wearing armor.

features.name: Daunting Roar (Leonin)
features.desc: Bonus action. Each creature of your choice within 10 ft must succeed on a WIS save (DC 12) or become frightened until the end of your next turn. 1/short rest.

features.name: Darkvision (Leonin)
features.desc: See in dim light as if bright, and darkness as if dim light, within 60 feet.

features.name: Wanderer (Outlander)
features.desc: Excellent memory for maps and terrain. Can find food and water for up to 5 companions per day in natural environments.

traits.personality: He watches over companions as if they were a litter of newborn cubs. He does not show it openly — but he positions himself between danger and the weak without thinking.
traits.ideal: Glory is remembrance. To be remembered is to resist erasure. Every battle must mean something — his name must echo in story long after his bones bleach in the sand.
traits.bond: He walks so the memory of the First Land does not die. The weight of a fallen pride lives in every step.
traits.flaw: He is slow to trust outsiders. Respect must be earned in sweat and blood. You do not simply enter a pride by standing near it.

backstory.short: Before the Temporal Compression, his homeland breathed with mythic air. The horizon was wider. Spirits walked the surface of things. Then the world hardened. Matter thickened. What moved like wind became stone-bound. His pride faded — some into legend, some into the petrified ruins that scholars now mistake for ancient monuments. He held form. Not because he was strongest — but because his will refused to dissolve.

chapters.title: The First Land
chapters.subtitle: Before the Compression
chapters.text: Long ago, his homeland was not like the world is now. The air was lighter. The horizon wider. Creatures moved as song. Spirits walked at the surface of things. There was no barrier between the mythic and the physical — they were the same substance, breathing together.

chapters.title: The Temporal Compression
chapters.subtitle: The Fall
chapters.text: Then came the shift — not a war, not a disaster. A hardening. The world compressed. Matter thickened. What once moved like wind became stone-bound. What once sang in the air fell silent. His pride did not all survive the transition. Some faded. Some became legend. Some petrified into monuments that scholars now mistake for ancient ruins.

chapters.title: He Held Form
chapters.subtitle: Why He Survived
chapters.text: He endured — not because he was strongest, but because his will would not dissolve. His rage anchored him to reality when reality itself was rewriting. He carries oral history that no book records. He remembers things that, to the modern world, never happened.

chapters.title: A World Too Small
chapters.subtitle: Now
chapters.text: Now he walks a world that feels smaller than it should be. He recognizes shapes in ruins others don't. He sometimes stares at stone and sees motion. He treats mountains like former living things. He does not rant. He is steady. Grounded. A survivor of the hardening of the world.

chapters.title: The Core Question
chapters.subtitle: What drives him
chapters.text: Does he believe the world fell once and it is done — or that the world is still falling, just slowly enough that no one else can feel it? That answer determines how he rages. And what he's really fighting for.

malc.name: Malc Grann
malc.quote: “A wall is a promise made of stone. I keep promises.”
malc.subtitle: Fighter · Neutral · Strong Wall

features.name: Second Wind
features.desc: Bonus Action: regain 1d10+1 HP. 2 uses / Long Rest; regain 1 use on Short Rest.

features.name: Defense (Fighting Style)
features.desc: +1 AC while wearing armor (included in AC).

features.name: Weapon Mastery
features.desc: Access to mastery properties (e.g., Slow on whip).

features.name: Darkvision
features.desc: Darkvision 60 ft.

features.name: Gnomish Cunning
features.desc: Advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saving throws.

features.name: Rock Gnome Clockwork
features.desc: Know Mending + Prestidigitation; can create Tiny clockwork devices via Prestidigitation (up to 3, last 8 hours).

backstory.short: Malc Grann, meaning Strong Wall, is what this Gnome calls himself. Self-proclaimed “Wall God.” Bright-eyed and excited to discuss and examine any sufficiently sturdy looking wall. His dream is to build the biggest and best wall that anyone has ever seen and declare it his temple!

traits.personality: Bright-eyed and delighted by any sufficiently sturdy wall. Speaks of masonry like liturgy.
traits.ideal: To build is to worship. A perfect wall is proof the world can be made better—stronger—on purpose.
traits.bond: His “temple wall” is his dream made physical. Anyone who helps lay its first stones becomes part of his myth.
traits.flaw: He confuses confidence with divinity, and can’t resist “proving” himself when a structure (or ego) is challenged.

raven.name: Raven
raven.subtitle: Shadar-Kai Rogue · Spy
raven.quote: Relax. If I wanted you dead, you'd be dead.
raven.footer: ✦   Touch them and I'll end you.   ✦

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.desc: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage with a finesse or ranged weapon if you have advantage on the attack roll, or if an ally is within 5 ft of the target and you don't have disadvantage.

features.name: Expertise
features.desc: Double proficiency bonus for Stealth and Sleight of Hand.

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.desc: Secret rogue language. Hidden messages inside normal conversation.

features.name: Blessing of the Raven Queen
features.desc: Bonus action teleport up to 30 ft. Gain resistance to all damage except force until the start of your next turn. Once per short or long rest.

features.name: Darkvision
features.desc: See in dim light within 60 ft as bright light, and in darkness as dim light.

features.name: Fey Ancestry
features.desc: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed; magic can't put you to sleep.

features.name: Trance
features.desc: Elves don't need to sleep. They meditate deeply for 4 hours to gain the benefits of a long rest.

traits.personality: Small frame. Quiet steps. Sharp tongue. Sharper blades. She teases her friends, mocks her enemies, and does not differentiate much in tone — only in outcome.
traits.ideal: She doesn't believe in ideals. She believes in hers. Loyalty like a war oath. Everyone else? Disposable.
traits.bond: Her ill-gotten gains support her family. She takes contracts. She finishes them clean. She never leaves witnesses if they threaten her circle.
traits.flaw: If there's a plan, she'll forget it. If she doesn't forget, she'll ignore it. She trusts instinct over strategy.

backstory.short: Born in the muted grey of the Shadowfell, Raven learned early that the world does not protect you — you protect yourself. She found work as a hired blade, not out of cruelty but necessity. Her family needed coin. She provided it, clean and efficient.

izabella.name: Izabella
izabella.subtitle: Fairy Wizard · Witherbloom Student · True Neutral
izabella.quote: Knowledge without application is just hoarding.
izabella.footer: ✦   The swamp does not forget. Neither does she.   ✦

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.desc: Once per day on a Short Rest: recover spell slots totaling ≤ half wizard level (round up). At Level 1: recover one 1st-level slot.

features.name: Wizard Spellbook
features.desc: 6 prepared 1st-level spells. Gain 2 spells per level. Copy from scrolls (2 hrs + 50 gp per level).

traits.personality: Small in stature, enormous in presence. Her curiosity is insatiable — she will touch everything, ask about everything, remember everything. Her laughter is genuine; her silences are calculating.
traits.ideal: Knowledge without application is just hoarding. She studies the boundary between life and death not out of morbidity, but because she believes something important lives there.
traits.bond: Her spellbook contains pressed flowers, margin notes in three languages, and a spell she hasn't been able to cast yet. The people she travels with have become, unexpectedly, something she would cross swamps for.
traits.flaw: She occasionally forgets other people cannot fly, hide instantly, or talk to mushrooms — leading to plans that only work if you're her.

backstory.short: A curious fairy who left the wild groves to study at Strixhaven's Witherbloom College, where the boundary between life and death is not a wall but a membrane. She pokes at it constantly.

features.name: Wrath of the Storm
features.description: When a creature within 5 ft hits you, use your reaction to cause it to make a DEX save (DC 13). On a fail, it takes 2d8 lightning or thunder damage; half on success. Uses = WIS modifier (3). Recharge on long rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol. Each undead within 30 ft must make a WIS save. On fail, it is turned for 1 minute or until damaged.

features.name: Tempest Domain Proficiencies
features.description: You gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

features.name: Tempest Domain Spells
features.description: Always prepared: Fog Cloud, Thunderwave (Lv1). At higher levels: Gust of Wind, Shatter (Lv3), Call Lightning, Sleet Storm (Lv5), Control Water, Ice Storm (Lv7), Destructive Wave, Insect Plague (Lv9).

features.name: Lightning Breath Weapon
features.description: Exhale lightning in a 5x30 ft line. Each creature makes a DEX save (DC 12). On fail: 2d6 lightning damage; half on success. Recharges on short or long rest.

features.name: Lightning Damage Resistance
features.description: You have resistance to lightning damage.

features.name: Inside Informant
features.description: You have connections to your previous employer and the groups you dealt with. You can communicate with your contacts to gain information at the DM's discretion.

traits.personality: The best way to get me to do something is to tell me I can't.
traits.ideal: I will do whatever it takes to become wealthy.
traits.bond: I will do anything to prove myself superior to my hated rival (moogle).
traits.flaw: I'm quick to assume that someone is trying to cheat me.
traits.appearance: Age: 25 · Height: 6'7" · Weight: 240 lbs · Eyes: Blue · Skin: Bronze · Hair: None

spells.name: Guidance
spells.description: You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the ability check. The spell then ends.

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.description: A creature you can see must pass a Wisdom save or take damage. If it's missing any hit points, the damage is 1d12 necrotic damage; otherwise, it's 1d8.
spells.higher_levels: Damage increases by one die when you reach 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

spells.name: Word of Radiance
spells.description: You utter a divine word, and burning radiance erupts from you. Each creature of your choice that you can see within range must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 radiant damage.
spells.higher_levels: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th (2d6), 11th (3d6), and 17th (4d6) level.

spells.name: Bless
spells.components: V, S, M (a sprinkling of holy water)
spells.description: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the attack roll or saving throw.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.description: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the radius of the fog increases by 20 feet for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature of your choice within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against this target before the end of your next turn has advantage, thanks to the mystical dim light glittering on the target until then.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.description: A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 1st.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube originating from you must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away from you. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't pushed. In addition, unsecured objects that are completely within the area of effect are automatically pushed 10 feet away from you by the spell's effect, and the spell emits a thunderous boom audible out to 300 feet.
spells.higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

wrath_of_storm.label: Wrath of the Storm
wrath_of_storm.description: Reaction to force DEX save when hit within 5 ft. 2d8 lightning or thunder damage.

backstory.summary: A lowly intern. I saw a job ad for a big fortune 5000 company called moogle & got hired on the spot. But I read the job description wrong, they didn't want a cleric they wanted a clerc(k). They all made fun of me for that. I used my time in the archives to learn most of their partners and I aim to undercut them in the global markets by starting my own information company called duck duck dragon. I need money for my startup so i joined a random party to get funds.
backstory.full: A lowly intern. I saw a job ad for a big fortune 5000 company called moogle & got hired on the spot. But I read the job description wrong, they didn't want a cleric they wanted a clerc(k). They all made fun of me for that. I used my time in the archives to learn most of their partners and I aim to undercut them in the global markets by starting my own information company called duck duck dragon. I need money for my startup so i joined a random party to get funds.
